hooks.command: F=/tmp/claude_watchdog_counter; C=$(cat "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); C=$((C+1)); echo "$C">"$F"; if [ $((C%50)) -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[WATCHDOG CHECK] %d tool calls reached. MANDATORY: (1) Is this task expected to take >=10 min? If yes, have you started a Haiku watchdog agent? If not, start one NOW with /tmp/task_<id>.json status file. (2) Has work been broken into <=10 min subtasks? If not, break it down. (3) Check elapsed time — if >15 min on a single task without reporting to user, STOP and give a status update. (4) Are you using the right model? Jira/merge/search tasks should use Sonnet/Haiku sub-agents, not Opus."}}' "$C"; fi
